name: Ghost Tank
notes: Signal Ridge's Covert Works exclusive. Cloaking tech trades raw stats for ambush potential: lower HP/damage than Tonk and no damageDealtModifiers, unlike Light Tank/Tonk. Invisible to non-detector units/buildings beyond revealRange (1 — very short, same convention as Sniper); detector units/buildings (Sniper, Radar Array) see it at their normal visionRange instead. revealsOnAttack means firing makes it visible to everyone until a few seconds pass without attacking, then it re-cloaks.
